author: lOrm
content: Split src/vdd/mod.rs (1941 LOC) into 7 focused submodules per Mandated Refactor. All four #[allow(clippy::...)] attributes (too_many_lines, unused_self, cast_possible_truncation x2) removed via structural extraction — not silenced. Public API preserved (VddEngine, VddResult, VddError, VddAdvisoryResult, VddBlockingResult). 1212/1212 lib tests pass (baseline unchanged), 0 clippy errors with -D pedantic/nursery.
